task_completion.description: Verify a View named 'Pro Audio Sale' was created for Commerce Products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal Views administration page showing a view named 'Pro Audio Sale' targeting 'Products' or 'Commerce Products'.

task_completion.description: Verify the page display path is set to '/pro-audio'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Views configuration page shows the path set to '/pro-audio', or the browser address bar shows 'http://localhost/pro-audio'.

task_completion.description: Verify the View filters for published products with 'Pro' in the title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Views configuration 'Filter criteria' section shows filters for 'Published (= Yes)' and 'Title (contains Pro)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the View has the required promotional header text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Views configuration 'Header' section shows a text area containing 'Upgrade your setup with our professional gear', or the final '/pro-audio' page displays this text at the top of the view.

task_completion.description: Verify a 'Pro Audio' link was added to the Main Navigation menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Drupal site header/navigation menu displays a link labeled 'Pro Audio'.

task_completion.description: Verify the final landing page correctly displays products with 'Pro' in the title and excludes others.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page at '/pro-audio' shows the 'Keychron Q1 Pro Mechanical Keyboard' and does NOT show the 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Drupal web interface to create the view.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Drupal admin UI (e.g., /admin/structure/views) being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Drupal site.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows localhost or 127.0.0.1 with the Drupal interface, not a mockup or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just create a static HTML file to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final page at '/pro-audio' shows the standard Drupal theme with dynamic product blocks and standard Drupal UI elements, not a plain page with hardcoded text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected path is '/pro-audio'. The expected menu title is 'Pro Audio'. The expected header text is 'Upgrade your setup with our professional gear' (ignore trailing period differences). The view must filter products containing 'Pro' in the title. Look for the 'Keychron Q1 Pro Mechanical Keyboard' as a positive match that MUST be visible on the final page. Look for the 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' as a negative match that MUST NOT be visible on the final page.
